assumptions: Each drone starts and ends its route at the depot (warehouse 0).
Each customer must be served exactly once.
A drone cannot exceed its max_payload on any single trip.
A drone cannot exceed its battery_capacity on a single route.
No-fly zones are rectangular areas; paths crossing them are forbidden.
Energy on a leg = Euclidean_distance × (demand_weight / max_load) when mode is distance_x_weight, else pure Euclidean distance.
Battery capacity derived as 3.5× the average depot round-trip distance across all customers.
No-fly zones are randomly generated (seed=42), sized ~4% of each grid dimension, and guaranteed not to cover the depot or any customer location.
